comments:
Caution: If the surveillance
video is needed as part of
an invenstigation it should
be retained with the
investigation case file. The
disposal or overwriting of
surveillance videos need
not be documented
through destruction
authorizations (1.2.001) or
in records disposition logs
(1.2.010).
series_description:
Video Surveillance for, but not limited to,
security of property and persons

comments:
Caution: coursework under
dispute may not be
destroyed until the
resolution of the dispute.
Caution: refer to 326
Caution: refer to 510
series_description:
This series documents student subject
mastery in institution courses. Records
may include but are not limited to
examinations and answers; quizzes and
answers; homework assignments; course
papers; term papers; and essay
assignments

comments:
The State Auditor's Office retains
any copies of its audits performed
on Texas state agencies.
series_description:
Audits and reviews performed by or on
behalf of an agency, including the working
papers that support the audit. Also
includes audits performed on the agency.

comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: The archival
requirement is met by sending the
required copies of the requests to
the Texas State Publications
Depository Program, Texas State
Library and Archives Commission.
Only copies of supporting
documentation submitted to the
Legislative Budget Board are
archival.
series_description:
Including any supporting documentation
created and/or used to justify and support
legislative appropriations requests by an
agency.

comments:
CAUTION: If a complaint becomes
the subject of litigation, it must be
included in and is subject to the
minimum retention period of item
number 1.1.048.
series_description:
Complaints received by an agency from
the public concerning the agency and
records pertaining to the resolution of the
complaint.
